title: eye FindAllPrompts blocking fix: cooldown 10s + MCP warmup guard
desc: FindAllPrompts no longer blocks at startup. Cooldown raised 1s->10s. SupplementCardsFromPrompts skipped until MCP cache warm (3s after window ready).
steps: commit 96e340c4 fix(eye/startup): remove tick-timeout self-terminate; fix blocking FindAllPrompts. commit 34c1a3a2: skip SupplementCardsFromPrompts until MCP cache warm. commit 7fe947bb: warm up MCP prompt cache 3s after window ready, never at startup. perf commit: FindAllPrompts cooldown 1s to 10s.
eye tick now returns quickly at startup. FindAllPrompts not called until prompt cache is warm.
Focus steal eliminated: FindAllPrompts was calling Chrome CDP which stole foreground during warmup. Guard prevents this.
author: claude
